title: ListEpics
description: DEPRECATED. `rebar list-epics` is now a thin wrapper over the generic list — `{p0_bugs, epics}`, each an array of ticket_state objects (epics also carry `children_count`). Blocking-awareness is the generic `--unblocked`/`--blocked` filter (default: only unblocked epics). Prefer `list --type=epic --status=open,in_progress --unblocked [--min-children=N]` + `list --type=bug --priority=0`.

p0_bugs.description: Priority-0 bugs as ticket_state objects (one generic `list --type=bug --priority=0` call).

epics.description: Epics as ticket_state objects (one generic `list --type=epic ...` call), each enriched with `children_count`.

children_count.description: Total non-deleted direct children of the epic (deleted tombstones excluded).
